prompt: Napravi agenta koji orchestrira naš CI/CD pipeline. Treba da pozove tri pod-agenta: security scanner, unit test runner, i code quality checker — i da vrati jedan konsolidovani izveštaj sa ukupnim verdiktom PASS/FAIL.
assertions: The output includes a <role> block identifying it as an orchestrator
The output describes coordination of multiple sub-agents or pipeline stages
The output includes a JSON schema for the consolidated report
The output includes PASS/FAIL or similar verdict logic
The output includes a <failure_modes> section covering sub-agent failure
The output includes an <example> block showing sample input/output
The total system prompt is at least 4000 characters
